root.docs_md:
Host-side git engine: runs git operations on background threads and bridges results
to the `files://` editor page.

items.name: GitPlugin
items.docs_md:
Wires the git bridge: runs each git request on a background thread and drains completed
results back to the originating webview.

items.name: window
items.signature: pub fn window(lines: &[crate::event::DiffLine], top_line: u32, rows: u32) -> (u32, Vec<crate::event::DiffLine>)

items.name: apply_hunk
items.signature: pub fn apply_hunk(file: &std::path::Path, index: u32, accept: bool) -> Result<(), GitError>

items.name: commit
items.signature: pub fn commit(file: &std::path::Path, message: &str) -> Result<(), GitError>
